consistency.class_name_match: The feature belongs to the 'paladin' class as specified.
consistency.level_context: Level 1 is standard for core class features.
consistency.name_and_mechanic_alignment: The name 'Great Weapon Fighting' perfectly aligns with the described mechanic of rerolling low damage dice with two-handed weapons.

quality.clarity: The description is clear, concise, and defines the conditions precisely (rolling a 1 or 2, melee weapon, two hands, reroll and must use new roll).
quality.completeness: The description fully details the mechanical effect and the necessary weapon property prerequisite (two-handed or versatile).

mechanics.trigger: Rolling a 1 or 2 on a damage die for an attack made with a two-handed melee weapon.
mechanics.effect: Reroll the die and use the new result.
mechanics.balance_note: This is a common and balanced feature for martial classes focused on heavy weapons, slightly increasing average damage output.
